summary: 2026-06-05 08:56:06 PDT — Re-review round 3 resolves prior finding ③. The diff removes the atomic tag / “no tag => not shipped” overclaim, makes the merge commit or PR MERGED state the authoritative shipped signal, keeps `shipped/<slug>` as a best-effort convenience label with remote push verification and repair wording, and updates the derived check to prefer the authoritative signal. AC8 and AC9 are met, and I found no new inconsistency in the changed wording.
